resourceTemplates.name: meeting-aiinsights
resourceTemplates.title: List AI insights for a meeting
resourceTemplates.description: Returns all AI insights (summaries, action items, notes) generated for a Microsoft Teams meeting via Copilot.

resourceTemplates.name: meeting-aiinsight
resourceTemplates.title: Get AI insight details for a meeting
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed AI-generated meeting insights including notes, action items, and transcript-derived mentions.
